tree.name: Josh Hart
tree.tradeDescription: 4-team trade: NYK traded Cam Reddish, Ryan Arcidiacono, Ante Tomic, and a 2023 1st (NYK own, protected) to POR. POR traded Dani Diez, Bojan Dubljevic, and Josh Hart to NYK. NYK also traded Sviatoslav Mykhailiuk to CHO. PHI/CHO also involved.

assetsGivenUp.name: Cam Reddish
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: NYK traded Kevin Knox and a 2022 1st (CHA own, conditional, did not convey) to Atlanta for Solomon Hill, Cam Reddish, and a 2025 2nd (BRK own)

assetsGivenUp.name: 2022 1st Round Pick via CHA
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Acquired from Charlotte in the Kai Jones trade. NYK traded Kai Jones (#19) to CHO for this conditional 2022 1st (CHA own). Did not convey.
assetsGivenUp.note: Pick was protected and did not convey.

assetsGivenUp.name: Kai Jones
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Drafted 19th overall by NYK in 2021, traded to Charlotte for this conditional 2022 1st

assetsGivenUp.name: Ante Tomic
assetsGivenUp.note: Drafted #44 by Utah (2008). Draft rights traded to NYK; never played in NBA. Used as salary filler in 4-team Hart trade.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2023 1st Round Pick (protected)
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: NYK's own 2023 first-round pick, protected. Sent to Portland in Josh Hart trade.
